privileged_info_summary: Task.json contains no 'metadata' field. The task downloads real portrait images from Unsplash (URLs verified as 500x400 JPEG images). The task extends a canvas in GIMP by 200px width and 150px height with the original image centered. The verifier checks: (1) canvas dimensions increased by ~200px width and ~150px height (±10px tolerance), (2) original content preserved at center with SSIM >= 0.85, (3) borders detected on 2+ sides with uniformity < 40, and (4) image size modification. Passing requires 3 of 4 criteria (75% score threshold).
